Employment
			




	Day-Time Line Cook
Ideal candidate would:
- have kitchen experience (scratch kitchen experience even better)
- have reliable transportation
- be willing to learn - be able to work under pressure
- have a positive attitude
-Ideal candidate would be available to work Saturday nights as well (this is NOT a must for position)
   

 
	Full-time / Part-time Server
We are currently looking for a server to join our team

Ideal Candidate would:
- be eager to learn
- have a positive/outgoing attitude
- get along well with others
- be able to work well under pressure
- have reliable transportation
- be smart serve certified (you can complete this upon hiring)
   

 


ABOUT US

Cyranos is an owner operated Italian restaurant with a modern Mediterranean flare, warm hospitality, fresh cooking, and a comfortable dining room in Bells Corners.
